ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subject was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subject details were last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the grade level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the grade level details were last updated */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Typical age range for students in the grade level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the equipment type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the equipment type details were last updated */,
  "is_supported" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the equipment is currently supported by the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject of the activity */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grade level of the activity */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of equipment required for the activity */,
  "teaching_method" TEXT /* Teaching method used for the activity (e.g., Remote, In-person) */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Game, Quiz, Video) */,
  "activity_url" TEXT /* URL to access the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity details were last updated */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the activity (1 for easy, 5 for hard) */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time in minutes required to complete the activity */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the activity is custom-created by a teacher */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grade level of the student */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student or parent */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student details were last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "is_disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student has any disabilities */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parent account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parent details were last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parent */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity accessed */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who accessed the activity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was accessed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was completed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student in the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the activity was completed */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time in minutes the student spent on the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
